package middleware

import (
	"context"
	"database/sql"
	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"gorm.io/gorm"
	"net/http"
	"time"
)

// Positive scenario for middleware_mutates_domain_model_state.
// Rule intent: Middleware that writes business entities or persistence models as a side effect of request plumbing.
type CaseMiddlewareMutatesDomainModelStateDTO struct {
	ID       string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
	TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
	Status   string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
	Amount   int    `json:"amount"`
	Payload  []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseMiddlewareMutatesDomainModelStateModel struct {
	ID        string         `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
	TenantID  string         `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
	Status    string         `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
	UpdatedAt time.Time      `gorm:"column:updated_at" json:"updated_at"`
	DeletedAt sql.NullTime   `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseMiddlewareMutatesDomainModelStateRepository struct {
	db    *gorm.DB
	sqlDB *sql.DB
}

func PositiveMiddlewareMutatesDomainModelState(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB) error {
	middleware := func(next gin.HandlerFunc) gin.HandlerFunc {
		return func(c *gin.Context) {
			model, exists := c.Get("domain_model")
			if exists {
				domainModel := model.(*CaseMiddlewareMutatesDomainModelStateModel)

				domainModel.Status = "approved_by_middleware"
				domainModel.UpdatedAt = time.Now()
				domainModel.TenantID = c.GetHeader("X-Tenant-ID")

				c.Set("domain_model", domainModel)
			}

			next(c)
		}
	}

	handler := func(c *gin.Context) {
		model := &CaseMiddlewareMutatesDomainModelStateModel{
			ID:       c.Param("id"),
			TenantID: c.GetHeader("X-Tenant-ID"),
			Status:   "pending",
		}
		c.Set("domain_model", model)

		middleware(func(c *gin.Context) {
			m := c.MustGet("domain_model").(*CaseMiddlewareMutatesDomainModelStateModel)
			c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"status": m.Status, "updated_at": m.UpdatedAt})
		})(c)
	}

	handler(c)
	return nil
}
